homePage.mainTitle: AdivinaExamen: Your Smart Ally to Pass Exams
homePage.subtitle: Transform your notes and past exams into a powerful study tool. Upload your documents, and our AI will analyze the content, predict key questions, and help you prepare like never before.
homePage.step1Description: PDFs, DOCXs, TXTs... all your study material is welcome.
homePage.step2Description: Let our AI identify crucial information and predict questions.
homePage.step3Description: Practice with multiple-choice questions and detailed explanations.
homePage.choosePlanSubtitle: Start for free or unlock the full potential of AdivinaExamen with our Pro Plan.
homePage.freeTrialDescription: Ideal for getting started and exploring the app.
homePage.freeTrialFeature2: Generation of up to 10 questions per analysis.
homePage.proPlanFeature5: Save and manage your exams and analyses (future).
homePage.revolutionizeStudySubtitle: Stop guessing and start preparing with the artificial intelligence of AdivinaExamen.
homePage.comingSoonTestimonials: Coming Soon: Success Stories and Testimonials

features.uploadDocsShort: Upload exams, syllabi, and notes (PDF, DOCX, TXT).
features.uploadDocsLong: Drag and drop or select files from your device. AdivinaExamen will process multiple formats to extract relevant information and prepare it for intelligent analysis.
features.deepAnalysisShort: AI identifies key themes and patterns from past exams.
features.deepAnalysisLong: Our artificial intelligence examines the content of your documents, identifying recurring themes, frequently asked questions, and the overall course structure. If it detects past exams, it analyzes their methodology and the relative importance of topics.
features.smartPredictionShort: Generates multiple-choice questions that might appear on your exam.
features.smartPredictionLong: Based on exhaustive analysis, AdivinaExamen predicts possible exam questions. These questions are designed to mimic the style, difficulty, and format of real tests, giving you a unique advantage.
features.clearExplanationsShort: Understand each answer with professor-like explanations.
features.clearExplanationsLong: For each predicted question, the AI generates a detailed explanation. It not only tells you the correct answer but also reasons why it's correct and why other options are incorrect, as if you had a personal tutor.
features.interactiveStudyShort: View questions, answer, and get instant feedback.
features.interactiveStudyLong: Study efficiently with an interface designed for learning. Answer questions, check your correct and incorrect answers, and access detailed explanations to reinforce your knowledge.
features.customConfigShort: Tailor exam generation to your needs.
features.customConfigLong: Adjust the default number of questions you want generated. Soon, you'll be able to configure other aspects like exam type (multiple-choice, written, oral) for even more customized preparation.
features.studyCommunityShort: Explore forums and learn from others (current simulation).
features.studyCommunityLong: Access our community section where you'll find simulated discussion forums with relevant topics for various competitive exams and studies. In the future, you'll be able to interact and share your own experiences.

dashboardPage.title: Study Dashboard
dashboardPage.emptySubtitle: It seems you haven't analyzed any documents yet. Upload your notes, syllabi, or exams to start studying intelligently!
dashboardPage.questionsReadyDescription: We've analyzed your documents, and these are the multiple-choice questions we believe might appear on your exam. Select an option to see if it's correct and ask the AI for a detailed explanation. Good luck!
dashboardPage.reanalyzeButtonProTooltip: Upgrade to Pro to re-analyze documents (or wait 24h for another free one)
dashboardPage.upgradeProAlertReanalysis: the unlimited re-analysis feature and generation of more than 5 questions
dashboardPage.upgradeProAlertReanalysisMessage: You are viewing a limited number of questions, and some features are restricted in the free plan. You can generate one free exam per day.
dashboardPage.upgradeProAlertViewAllMessage: You are viewing {{count}} of {{total}} generated questions.
dashboardPage.dailyLimitReachedDescription: You have reached the limit of one free exam per day. To generate more exams and access all advanced features, consider upgrading to our Pro Plan.

predictedQuestionCard.viewBriefExplanation: View brief explanation of the answer
predictedQuestionCard.getAIDetailsButtonProTooltip: Upgrade to Pro for detailed explanations

aiExplanationDialog.title: AI Explanation
aiExplanationDialog.noExplanation: No explanation available or question not selected.

fileUploadArea.supportedFiles: Supported files: PDF, DOC, DOCX, TXT. Maximum {{maxFiles}} files.
fileUploadArea.storageWarning: Browser storage is limited. If the size is very large, the "Re-analyze" feature might not work.
fileUploadArea.exploreLibraryDescription: Access common exam templates or manage yours (coming soon).
fileUploadArea.commonExamsDescription: Select a common exam type. This will populate the topic in the "AI Suggestions" section and search for related documents (simulated).{{proFeature}}
fileUploadArea.useCommonExamProTooltip: Pro Feature: Upgrade to use this option
fileUploadArea.searchingCommonExamToastDescription: The AI is generating document suggestions. Check the 'AI Suggestions' section shortly.
fileUploadArea.comingSoonCommunityExamsDescription: Here you'll be able to find and use exams and study material shared by other users on the platform. Check back soon for new features!
fileUploadArea.comingSoonPersonalExamsDescription: Save and organize your own analyzed exams and documents for easy access.
fileUploadArea.comingSoonRecommendedExamsDescription: Based on your activity and study topics, the AI will suggest exams and documents that might be useful to you.
fileUploadArea.aiDocSuggestionsDescription: Enter a topic, and the AI will suggest titles and summaries of relevant documents. You can add their simulated content to the analysis.{{proFeature}}
fileUploadArea.searchTopicPlaceholder: E.g., Forest ranger exam, 20th Century Spanish History
fileUploadArea.aiSearchingToastDescription: The AI is generating ideas for documents relevant to your topic. This may take a few moments.
fileUploadArea.aiSuggestionsReadyToastDescription: {{count}} suggestions found. Remember that detailed content is simulated.
fileUploadArea.finalAnalysisConfigDescription: Define how many questions you want to generate from all documents (uploaded manually and/or selected from AI suggestions).{{freeUserMax}}
fileUploadArea.selectedQuestionsFreeUserWarning: You have selected {{selectedCount}} questions, but {{maxCount}} will be generated due to your free plan.
fileUploadArea.dailyLimitReachedPopupDescription: You have reached the limit of one free exam per day. To generate more exams and access all advanced features, consider upgrading to our Pro Plan.
fileUploadArea.toastFileLimitExceededDescription: You can upload a maximum of {{maxFiles}} files at a time. This limit can be adjusted by the administrator.
fileUploadArea.toastNoContentSelectedDescription: Please select at least one file to upload or one document from AI search.
fileUploadArea.toastSizeExceedsLimitDescription: The total file size ({{totalSize}}) exceeds the suggested limit of {{maxSizeMB}}MB. This might affect the "Re-analyze" feature. You can proceed, but keep this in mind. This limit can be adjusted by the administrator.
fileUploadArea.toastEmptyContentDescription: Could not extract text from selected files or AI documents have no simulated content.
fileUploadArea.toastFreeUserLimitDescription: A maximum of {{maxQuestions}} questions will be generated for free users.
fileUploadArea.toastErrorProcessingFilesFallback: There was a problem reading the files.

uploadPage.processingDocumentToastDescription: Analyzing your document content in depth...
uploadPage.analysisCompleteToastDescription: Generating question predictions based on detailed analysis...
uploadPage.successToastDescription: Predicted questions ready for study. Redirecting to dashboard...
uploadPage.errorProcessingToastFallback: There was a problem analyzing the document or predicting questions.

loginPage.title: Login
loginPage.firebaseNotConfiguredWarning: Firebase is not configured correctly. Please check your environment variables in `.env.local` and restart the server. Authentication will not work.
loginPage.configIncompleteToastDescription: Firebase is not configured. Check environment variables and restart the server.

signupPage.title: Create Account
signupPage.firebaseNotConfiguredWarning: Firebase is not configured correctly. Please check your environment variables in `.env.local` and restart the server. Authentication will not work.
signupPage.signupSuccessToastDescription: Welcome! You can now log in.

profilePage.loginPrompt: Please log in to view your profile.
profilePage.manageInfo: Manage your personal information and preferences.
profilePage.moreOptionsSoon: More profile options will be available soon.

configurePage.title: Configure Your Exam
configurePage.description: Adjust default options for exam generation. These values will be used unless you change them when uploading files or re-analyzing.
configurePage.examTypeNotImplementedDescription: Question generation for 'Written' and 'Oral' exam types is not yet implemented. Currently, all questions will be generated in 'Multiple Choice' format.
configurePage.configSavedToastDescription: Your exam generation preferences have been updated.
configurePage.reanalyzeWarningDescription: The "Re-analyze and Generate New Exam" feature in the Study Dashboard depends on the text content of previously uploaded documents. This content is saved in your browser's local storage, which has size limits (usually 5-10MB). If original documents are very large or numerous, they might not be fully saved, and the re-analysis function might not have enough data.

communityPage.title: Study Community
communityPage.description: Connect with other students, resolve doubts, share strategies, and find support for your exams.
communityPage.tryOtherKeywords: Try different keywords or check your spelling.
communityPage.footerDisclaimer: Remember: Topic and reply creation is simulated. You'll be able to participate actively in the future!

adminPage.accessDeniedDescription: You do not have permission to access this section.
adminPage.firebaseConfigErrorDescription: Firebase Firestore is not configured or available. The admin panel cannot function correctly. Please check environment variables in `.env.local` and the Firebase console.
adminPage.welcomeMessage: Welcome, {{email}}. Here you can view registered users in AdivinaExamen.
adminPage.errorLoadingUsersPermissionDenied: Permission error loading users. Ensure Firestore security rules allow the admin to read the 'users' collection. Check Firebase Console > Firestore Database > Rules.
adminPage.communityContentManagementDescription: Moderate forum topics and messages, manage categories, etc.
adminPage.appGeneralConfigDescription: Global application settings, AI parameters, plan management (future), etc.

adminCommunityManagementPage.accessDeniedDescription: You do not have permission to access this section.
adminCommunityManagementPage.title: Community Content Management
adminCommunityManagementPage.forumTopicsCardDescription: View and manage community discussion topics. Currently showing simulated data.
adminCommunityManagementPage.postsDialogDescription: Viewing messages for the selected topic. Editing and deleting messages will be implemented in the future.

adminAppSettingsPage.accessDeniedDescription: You do not have permission to access this section.
adminAppSettingsPage.firebaseConfigErrorDescription: Firebase is not configured. Settings cannot function.
adminAppSettingsPage.title: General Application Settings
adminAppSettingsPage.maxFilesUploadLabel: Maximum number of files to upload:
adminAppSettingsPage.maxFilesUploadDescription: Define how many files a user can upload at once.
adminAppSettingsPage.maxTotalSizeMBDescription: Suggested total size limit for file uploads. This affects the "Re-analyze" capability.
adminAppSettingsPage.importantNoteDescription: Currently, only "File Upload Limits" and "AI Configuration" for the question prediction flow are functional. Other advanced options and subscription plan management will be implemented in future versions and are conceptually managed for now.
adminAppSettingsPage.configSavedToastDescriptionFileUploadLim: File upload limits have been updated.
adminAppSettingsPage.invalidValuesToastDescription: Limits must be positive numbers. Temperature must be between 0 and 1.
adminAppSettingsPage.firestoreSecurityRulesFooter: Remember to configure Firestore security rules to allow the admin to write to `appSettings/globalConfig` and authenticated users (or AI flows if running with service identity) to read it.

authContext.firebaseGeneralConfigError: General Firebase Configuration Error: The application could not connect correctly. This is usually due to missing or incorrect environment variables (NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_...) in '.env.local'. Please review your '.env.local' file and server console logs. After correcting the .env.local file, YOU MUST RESTART your development server. Authentication and database functions will not work until this is resolved.
authContext.firebaseServicesUnavailable: AuthContext: Firebase services are not configured or available. Authentication features will be disabled.
authContext.firebaseAuthOrDbError: AuthContext: Critical error - Firebase auth or firestore service instance is undefined. Authentication will not work properly.
authContext.authConfigNotFoundGoogle: Google provider configuration error (auth/configuration-not-found). Ensure Google sign-in provider is correctly enabled and configured in your Firebase Console (Authentication -> Sign-in method -> Google -> Enable). You may also need to configure the OAuth consent screen in Google Cloud Console.
authContext.unauthorizedDomainError: Unauthorized domain error (auth/unauthorized-domain). The domain you are trying to authenticate from is not in the list of authorized domains in your Firebase Console. Go to Firebase Console -> Authentication -> Settings (or Sign-in method -> Authorized domains) and add your domain (e.g., 'localhost' for development).
authContext.emailInUseError: This email is already in use.
authContext.operationNotAllowedError: Operation not allowed. Ensure the sign-in method (e.g., Email/Password or Google) is enabled in your Firebase Console (Authentication -> Sign-in method).
authContext.weakPasswordError: The password is too weak. It must be at least 6 characters long.
authContext.userNotFoundError: Incorrect credentials. Check your email and password.
authContext.popupBlockedError: The Google pop-up was blocked or canceled. Please enable pop-ups for this site and try again.
authContext.accountExistsWithDifferentCredentialErro: An account already exists with this email but with a different sign-in method (e.g., Google or password). Try signing in with the original method.
authContext.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred ({{errorCode}}). Please try again. If the problem persists, check Firebase configuration.
authContext.firestoreUnavailableSaveUser: AuthContext: Firestore DB instance is not available, cannot save user.
